name: Charcoal Grilled Salmon with Spicy Black Bean
recipeIngredient: 1 Bay Leaf, tied together with 3 Sprigs Thyme
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the beans, onion, carrot, celery, ham, jalapeno peppers, whole garlic clove, bay leaf tied together with thyme, and water in a large saucepan.
2. Simmer until the beans are tender, about 2 hours, adding more water as necessary to keep the beans covered.
3. Remove the carrot, celery, herbs, and garlic, and drain off the remaining cooking liquid.
4. Toss the beans with the minced garlic, hot pepper flakes, and juice of half a lemon. Set aside.
5. While the beans are cooking, combine the juice of a whole lemon, olive oil, and basil leaves.
6. Pour over the salmon steaks and refrigerate for 1 hour.
7. Grill the salmon over a moderately high flame for 4-5 minutes per side, basting with some of the marinade every minute.
8. Serve each steak with a portion of beans.
Per Serving: Calories: 480, Protein: 42 g, Carbohydrate: 25 g, Fat: 23 g, Saturated Fat: 4 g, Cholesterol: 106mg, Sodium: 291 mg, Fiber: 8g.
